blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned about the value of monitoring IIS web servers
- Installed and configured the IIS integration with Grafana Alloy
- Enabled IIS performance counters for detailed telemetry
- Installed pre-built dashboards and explored request rate and error metrics
- Learned how to use pre-built alerts to detect and respond to common IIS issues

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Monitor a Windows system in Grafana Cloud](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/windows-integration/)
- [Explore data using Metrics Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-metrics/)
- [Explore logs using Logs Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-logs/)
- [Monitor collector health using Grafana Fleet Management](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/fleet-mgt-monitor-health/)

---

### More to explore

The world is your oyster! Read more about how you can:

- [Explore Windows exporter collectors](https://grafana.com/docs/alloy/latest/reference/components/prometheus/prometheus.exporter.windows/)
- [Build custom dashboards](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/dashboards/build-dashboards/)
- [Scale your deployment](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/send-data/fleet-management/introduction/)
